title: PlanStepStartedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_step_started` event — step transitioned from pending to running. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.2.

step_id.description: UUID of the step; unique within the plan.

ordinal.description: Zero-based position of the step within its plan.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the step does.

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan serves a scheduled or on-demand goal.
